title: salix × restituta
intro: Salix × restituta, also known as the black willow or restituta willow, is a hybrid of two willow species that is native to North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its high content of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix × restituta include reducing fever, relieving headaches and muscle pain, and treating rheumatism and arthritis. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat pain and inflammation.
